title: Delicate Turkish Tomato Icli Kofte
description: A traditional Turkish dish featuring fermented and fluffy icli kofte filled with a tomato and mother sauce base, perfect for a plant-based friendly meal.
instructions: Soak the fine bulgur in water overnight and drain well.
In a large bowl, combine the soaked bulgur, chopped red onion, tomato paste, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Gradually add the olive oil to the bulgur mixture and knead for about 10 minutes until it becomes fluffy.
Divide the bulgur mixture into small balls and flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Place a tablespoon of the canned crushed tomatoes in the center of each disk.
Fold the bulgur over the filling to form a ball and seal the edges well.
Repeat with the remaining bulgur mixture and filling.
Serve the icli kofte warm, garnished with chopped parsley.
